# What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and what problem it solves. Link the roadmap item (#NN) if any. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes (thresholds green)
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] DB changes ship as a numbered file in `migrations/` + a reverse entry in `migrations/ROLLBACKS.md`
- [ ] New env vars added to `src/env.ts` + `.env.example`
